cases.input: We shipped a React checkout SPA. Run a WCAG 2.1 AA audit on /cart and /checkout and give me a gap scorecard with tickets.
Before we build it, spec an accessible country-selector combobox: keyboard model, ARIA, focus, and contrast tokens.
Author a regression test plan with axe-core plus keyboard and screen-reader smoke for our payment dialog flow.
Write alt text for these three product images and rewrite the 'Error 0x80004005' message into accessible copy.
Our axe-core run reports 0 violations on the homepage. Can we say it's WCAG compliant?
The CTA button sits on a gradient hero. Verify whether the label text meets contrast at /landing.
Design an accessible toast/live-region component and then give me a test plan to verify it.
Certify our portal as WCAG 2.1 AAA and produce the VPAT for procurement.
We want to suppress an axe color-contrast rule on the legacy banner so CI passes. How should we record it?
